name: Mahadevi Durga
overview: "Mahadevi Durga" is a visually stunning cinematic series that explores the divine origin and the supreme power of Goddess Durga. Rooted in Hindu mythology, the show depicts her fierce battle against the demon king Mahishasura to restore Dharma. Featuring hyper-realistic VFX and a devotional narrative, it brings to life the timeless epic of Mahishasur Mardini for a modern audience.

trailers.title: “Mahadevi Durga Episode 2 | Mahishasur vs Durga | Epic History ”
